constraints.constraint: waiver_log.json is append-only — entries are never mutated after write
constraints.enforcement: WaiverTracker only calls json.append(), never json.loads + mutate + json.dumps on existing entries

constraints.constraint: accuracy() returns None when waiver count < 5
constraints.enforcement: Explicit sample size guard before ratio computation

constraints.constraint: A waiver with no incident in the window is an ACCURATE waiver — increases score, not neutral
constraints.enforcement: accuracy = accurate_waivers / total_waivers where accurate means no incident in window

constraints.constraint: window_days defaults to 90 but is configurable per call
constraints.enforcement: window_days parameter on accuracy() and waivers_before_incident() with default=90

constraints.constraint: run_id is the waiver key, not timestamp
constraints.enforcement: record_waiver() requires run_id; waivers_before_incident() returns run_id in results
